ddls:
CREATE TABLE "railway_lines" (
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each railway line */,
  "line_name" TEXT /* Name of the railway line */,
  "total_length" REAL /* Total length of the railway line */,
  "start_station" TEXT /* Name of the starting station */,
  "end_station" TEXT /* Name of the ending station */,
  "track_gauge" TEXT /* Track gauge of the railway line */,
  "electrification_type" TEXT /* Type of electrification used */,
  "max_speed_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum speed limit on the line */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Hours of operation for the line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each section */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the railway line the section belongs to */,
  "section_name" TEXT /* Name of the section */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of the section (e.g., A, B) */,
  "section_length" REAL /* Length of the section */,
  "average_grade" REAL /* Average grade of the section */,
  "section_status" TEXT /* Status of the section (e.g., Active, Under Maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sections_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES railway_lines ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blocks" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the section the block belongs to */,
  "block_number" INTEGER /* Number of the block within the section */,
  "block_length" REAL /* Length of the block in meters */,
  "block_grade" REAL /* Grade of the block as a percentage */,
  "speed_limit" INTEGER /* Speed limit for the block in kilometers per hour */,
  "infrastructure" TEXT /* Infrastructure details (e.g., station names) */,
  "station_side" TEXT /* Side of the station relative to the block */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the block in meters */,
  "cumulative_elevation" REAL /* Cumulative elevation from the start of the line in meters */,
  "traverse_time" INTEGER /* Time in seconds to traverse the block */,
  "block_status" TEXT /* Status of the block (e.g., Occupied, Vacant) */,
  "occupancy_status" TEXT /* Occupancy status of the block (e.g., Free, Reserved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blocks_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the railway line the station is on */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location description of the station */,
  "station_code" TEXT /* Short code for the station */,
  "station_category" TEXT /* Category of the station (e.g., Terminal, Intermediate) */,
  "number_of_platforms" INTEGER /* Number of platforms at the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stations_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES railway_lines ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "infrastructure" (
  "infra_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each infrastructure element */,
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the block the infrastructure is associated with */,
  "infra_type" TEXT /* Type of infrastructure (e.g., bridge, tunnel) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the infrastructure */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the infrastructure (e.g., Good, Poor) */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Scheduled maintenance for the infrastructure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("infra_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_infrastructure_block_id FOREIGN KEY ("block_id") REFERENCES blocks ("block_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trains" (
  "train_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each train */,
  "train_name" TEXT /* Name of the train */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the railway line the train operates on */,
  "train_type" TEXT /* Type of train (e.g., Local, Express) */,
  "max_speed" INTEGER /* Maximum speed of the train */,
  "seating_capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the train */,
  "operating_schedule" TEXT /* Schedule of the train */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("train_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trains_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES railway_lines ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "train_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the train the schedule belongs to */,
  "departure_station" INTEGER /* Departure station of the train */,
  "arrival_station" INTEGER /* Arrival station of the train */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Departure time of the train */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Arrival time of the train */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_train_id FOREIGN KEY ("train_id") REFERENCES trains ("train_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance request */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset the request is for */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of asset (e.g., Infrastructure, Train) */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance needed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., Pending, In Progress, Completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_requests_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES infrastructure ("infra_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_requests_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES trains ("train_id")
)
